landing.headline: Zero to Full Stack Hero 2.0 🔥
landing.tagline:
This isn't just another COURSE.
It's the BEST DEVELOPER COMMUNITY in the world.
highlights: ✔ From learning Web Development Fundamentals to mastering Next.js!
✔ We teach exciting technologies like Next.js 15, React.js, Firebase, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS and SO MUCH MORE!
✔ Weekly live mentoring sessions with Ramon deliver dynamic content unlike any Udemy course!
✔ Access to 60+ Real Projects and 100 Coding Challenges to take your skills even further!
✔ Exclusive access to the Programming with Ramon and Discord communities
✔ The DEFINITIVE community to succeed as a Full Stack developer, even after you land your job!
✔ AI Mastery Module: learn to use AI and AI tools to supercharge your career as a developer!
✔ Complete SaaS Module: everything you need to know about building, scaling, and marketing successful SaaS applications!
landing.techStackHeading: Learn the technologies used by the biggest companies

training.heading: Full Stack Training
training.body: This course was designed to cover ALL elements of web development, including Frontend, Backend technologies, and everything in between.

mentoring.heading: Weekly Mentoring Calls
mentoring.body:
Every week, Ramon hosts a Full Stack Mastermind mentoring session that many describe as "worth more than a university degree".
Get ready for a transformative experience.

community.heading: Exclusive Programming with Ramon Community
community.body:
Have you heard the phrase "your network is your net worth"?
With Programming with Ramon we take that to a completely different level.
All of this inside the Programming with Ramon community.

coaches.heading: Get Support from the Programming with Ramon Success Coach Team
coaches.body:
The Programming with Ramon Success Coaches are here to help you overcome challenges that Stack Overflow can't solve.
Get personalized code reviews and practical guidance for your programming problems.

discord.heading: Exclusive Discord Channels, Emojis, and More!
discord.body:
This is more than a community.
It's the world's largest programming FAMILY.
We work hard together.
We have fun together.

income.heading: Everything you need to go from ZERO to earning your first income with programming
income.body: We teach how to turn your skill and passion for programming into a sustainable income source capable of changing your life.

intro: We created 4 complete eBooks on JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, and Next.js.
They will serve as your definitive reference guide to accelerate your learning and daily consultation.
These materials were developed to bring together, in one place, everything you need to know to become a top-tier developer.

instructor.heading: 👨‍🏫 Meet Your Instructor
instructor.name: I'm Ramon Rodrigues 💯
instructor.intro: I'll be your mentor and coach inside the Programming with Ramon community.
bio: I have over 15 years of programming experience.
As a Full Stack developer, I've worked at both startups and large companies, helping organizations build, scale, and optimize their products.
Along this journey, I discovered that my true passion was helping others grow professionally and achieve their goals as developers.
With that mission, I've already trained thousands of developers around the world.
Through live sessions on YouTube, I've accumulated millions of views demonstrating how to apply development skills to real projects and practical challenges.
My goal is to deliver REAL VALUE through REAL PROJECTS.
You'll learn in practice the skills demanded by today's market and gain experience applicable to the professional world.
And if that's still not enough...
I've recreated dozens of the world's most popular applications to teach advanced Full Stack development concepts.

faq.question: Is Zero to Full Stack Hero suitable for beginners?
answer: The program was designed to serve both absolute beginners and experienced developers who want to level up their skills.

faq.question: Can I pay in installments?
answer: There are 3-installment payment options for Silver, Platinum, and Diamond plans.

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?

subsections.title: Upgrade
subsections.body:
Yes.
You can upgrade by paying only the price difference between plans.

subsections.title: Downgrade
subsections.body:
No.
You cannot move to a lower plan and request a refund for the difference.

faq.question: Do you offer refunds?
answer: The community's purpose is to bring together people committed to execution and their results.
For this reason, there is no refund policy after purchase.
We recommend reviewing all content carefully before purchasing.

faq.question: Will I receive a certificate of completion?
answer: Upon completing the course, you'll receive an Official Certificate of Completion.
The certificate will serve as formal proof of the skills acquired during the program.

faq.question: Do you accept cryptocurrencies?
answer: We accept some of the major cryptocurrencies, including:
1. Payment must be made in full.
2. Installments are not available for cryptocurrency payments.
3. After organizing your funds, contact the team to finalize your purchase.

finalCta.heading: 🚀 What are you waiting for? Join Zero to Full Stack Hero 2.0 today!
